market_rules:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the official closing price for NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) on February 9 is higher than the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

If the final session is shortened (for example, due to a market-holiday schedule), the official closing price published for that shortened session will still be used for resolution.

If no official closing price is published for that session (for example, due to a trading halt into the close, system issue, delisting, or other disruption), the market will use the last valid on-exchange trade price of the regular session as the effective closing price.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Yahoo Finance. The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Yahoo Finance after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Yahoo Finance, specifically the NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) "Close" prices available at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/NVDA/history, published under "Historical Prices."

By
[Kara Greenberg] 
![Kara Greenberg] 
[Full Bio] 
* [] 
* [] 
Kara Greenberg is a senior news editor for Investopedia, where she does work writing, editing, and assigning daily markets and investing news. Prior to joining Investopedia, Kara was a researcher and editor at The Wire. Earlier in her career, she worked in financial compliance and due diligence at Loomis, Sayles & Company, and The Bank of New York Mellon.

[editorial policies]

Romain Doucelin / NurPhoto / Getty Images

### Key Takeaways
* Nvidia is set to report quarterly results after the closing bell Wednesday, with expectations running high for record-beating numbers.
* Options pricing suggests traders see the stock moving close to 6% in either direction by the end of the week.

Nvidia is set to report earnings after the closing bell today, with traders anticipating a sizable move from the AI chipmaker's stock.
[Options pricing] suggests traders expect Nvidia ([NVDA]) shares could move close to 6% in either direction by the end of the week. A move of that size from the stock's recent level around $196 could potentially push it to a new high just above $207, or drag it back down to $185.

## Market Context
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the official closing price for NVIDIA (NVDA) on the final trading day of February 2026 is higher than the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the final trading day of the month is shortened (for example, due to a market-holiday schedule), the official closing price published for that shortened session will still be used for resolution.

# Nvidia's Earnings Could Be a Make or Break Moment for the Stock Market
By
[Colin Laidley] 
![Colin Laidley Headshot] 
[Full Bio] 
* [] 
Colin is an Associate Editor focused on tech and financial news. He has more than three years of experience editing, proofreading, and fact-checking content on current financial events and politics. He received his M.A. in journalism from The New School and his B.A. in history and political science from McGill University.
Learn about our
[editorial policies] 
Published February 25, 2026
12:17 PM EST
![Jensen Huang, chief executive officer of Nvidia Corp., speaks during the 2026 CES event in Las Vegas, Nevada, US, on Tuesday, Jan. 6, 2026.] 
Investors are eager to hear what CEO Jensen Huang has to say about the outlook for Nvidia and the AI boom more broadly.
Bridget Bennett / Bloomberg / Getty Images

### Key Takeaways
* AI chip giant Nvidia's quarterly earnings report, due after the bell on Wednesday, could reinforce expectations for strong growth in businesses supplying data centers and amplify concerns about a deluge of industry-disrupting AI innovations on the horizon.
* Traders expect a large post-earnings move for Nvidia stock, which has more influence within the S&P 500 than five of the index's 11 sectors.

news.headline: Will NVIDIA Crush Q4 Earnings Tonight?
news.content:
# Live: Will NVIDIA Crush Q4 Earnings Tonight? - 24/7 Wall St.

Published: 2026-02-25T19:30:03+00:00
Author: Eric Bleeker
Type: Non-news

## Summary

Nvidia (NVDA) is set to report its fiscal Q4 2026 earnings, with Wall Street expecting $66B in revenue. The company has gained 5.2% year to date, making it the top performer in the Magnificent 7. The stock has been gaining 5.3% year-to-date. Last quarter, Nvidia guided for revenue of $65 billion, plus or minus 2%, suggesting a range of roughly $63.7 billion to $66.3 billion. However, guidance for Q1 FY2027 may be crucial, as any below $72 billion in Q1 guidance would disappoint the market. Predictions markets are pricing in a 95% probability of an earnings beat, which raises the bar significantly for NVIDIA. Key storylines to watch include China revenue, and whether NVIDIA will update its $500 billion target by the end of calendar 2026.

## Story

Live: Will NVIDIA Crush Q4 Earnings Tonight? - 24/7 Wall St. [S&P 5006,949.30 +0.85%] [Dow Jones49,443.00 +0.56%] [Nasdaq 10025,335.00 +1.42%] [Russell 20002,665.45 +0.52%] [FTSE 10010,819.00 +0.98%] [Nikkei 22559,640.30 +2.95%] Live Coverage Updates appear automatically as they are published. # Live: Will NVIDIA Crush Q4 Earnings Tonight? Loading chart data... ### Quick Read Nvidia (NVDA) reports fiscal Q4 2026 earnings tonight with Wall Street expecting $66B in revenue. We will be updating this blog with live news and analysis. Want to follow along? Simply stay on this page, and new updates will post automatically. Nvidia’s Q1 fiscal 2027 guidance carries more weight than Q4 results for assessing Blackwell demand sustainability. The stock gained has 5.2% year to date, which makes NVIDIA the top performer in the Magnificent 7. - Nvidia made early investors rich, but there is a new class of 'Next Nvidia Stocks' that could be even better; [learn more here.] ## Live Updates ### Welcome to our NVIDIA Earnings Live Blog 5 minutes ago Live Welcome to our NVIDIA earnings live blog.

agent_action.reasoning: Recent news indicates strong earnings and positive market sentiment for NVIDIA, with a high probability of the stock closing above $160. The current market price of 0.50 is below my belief probability of 0.94, suggesting a positive expected value. However, since I already hold a significant position, I will HOLD to avoid overexposure.
